purpose: Conservative terms that make a creator-facing shot instruction harder to follow without production knowledge.
maintenance: Lane D plain-language review may add, remove, or replace terms after checking real direction outputs.

terms.plain_language: move the camera while changing zoom to keep the subject the same size
tilt the camera so the horizon is diagonal
start the next shot's sound before its picture
keep the current shot's sound playing over the next picture
place a dark surface beside the subject to deepen shadows
shift sharp focus from one subject to another
turn the camera sideways very quickly
